title: Roasted Chewy Mexican Corn Tacos
description: Roasted corn adds a caramelized crunch to these comforting tacos, finished with lime, cilantro, and a touch of coconut sugar for a subtle sweetness.
instructions: Remove the husks and silk from the corn and slice the ears into 1-inch pieces.
In a bowl toss the corn with olive oil, smoked paprika, chili powder, cumin, salt, pepper, and coconut sugar until evenly coated.
Spread the seasoned corn on a baking sheet and roast for 12 to 15 minutes, stirring halfway through, until caramelized and slightly charred.
While the corn roasts, warm the tortillas on a dry skillet or microwave for 30 seconds.
Remove the roasted corn from the oven and squeeze lime juice over it.
Fold the warm tortillas, fill with roasted corn, top with sliced avocado and chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately, optionally adding a drizzle of lime or a pinch of extra chili powder.
Enjoy the chewy, sweet, and savory flavors of these tacos.
